case_title: REZA ARMAN PAHLAVAN VS. CITADEL RE & INVESTMENTS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE *NOTICE*: THE HEREIN CASE IS BEING DISMISSED BECAUSE IT IS DUPLICATIVE OF CASE # CGC-17-561982. DUE TO AN ERROR IN THE FILING PROCESS PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT WAS FILED TWICE. ALL RIGHTS, CLAIMS, AND DEFENSE ARE RESERVED. (TRANSACTION ID # 17291066)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-21-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAHLAVAN, REZA ARMAN , AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT CITADEL RE & INVESTMENTS LLC , A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY LE, CARL , AN INDIVIDUAL CAI, DISEN , AN INDIVIDUAL BGSM, INC. , A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION D.B.A. KELLER WILLIAMS PENINSULA ESTATES DOES 1-30 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-21-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-18-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-26-2018
